label:
收获宝典动作
Harvest Compendium Actions

Hyper-Focused Craft.name: 超专注制作 Hyper-Focused Craft
Hyper-Focused Craft.description:
你花费1小时在一个项目上取得进展，以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{制作}一件或多件物品。在这1小时内，你完全专注于你的工作，不能做任何其他事情。如果你在这段时间内被打断，你将自动使该动作失败。

此动作是受训的制作动作的延伸，并遵循相同的需求。在这一小时结束时，你为你试图制作的物品的等级进行一次标准DC的@Check[type:crafting]检定。

成功 你在项目上取得等同于1天工作的进展。你将处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}。在以这种方式疲乏时，你不能使用任何探索动作。

失败 你在项目上没有取得进展，但你不会浪费任何材料。你处于疲乏。在以这种方式疲乏时，你不能使用任何探索动作。

You spend 1 hour making headway on a project to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{Craft} an item or items. During this hour, you focus entirely on your work and can’t do anything else. If you are interrupted during this time, you automatically fail the action.

This action is an extension of the Craft trained action, and it follows the same requirements. At the end of the hour, you make a standard DC @Check[type:crafting] check for the level of the item you’re trying to make.

Success You make progress on your project equal to 1 day of work. You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}. You cannot use any exploration actions while fatigued in this way.

Failure You make no progress on your project, but you don’t waste any materials. You are fatigued. You cannot use any exploration actions while fatigued in this way.

Process Item.name: 处理物品 Process Item
Process Item.description:
需求 你正持用或穿戴一套炼金工具。

 你花费1小时精炼从一名生物身上采集的毒液、毒药或类似物品，从而移除该物品的未加工特征并使其可用。

掷骰一次@Check[type:crafting]检定。GM设定DC，通常为该物品等级的标准DC。

成功 该物品的未加工特征被移除，并且现在可用。

失败 该物品被毁且无法使用。  

Requirements You are holding or wearing a set of alchemist’s tools.

 You spend 1 hour refining a venom, poison, or similar item harvested from a creature, thereby removing the unprocessed trait from the item and making it useable.

Roll a @Check[type:crafting] check. The GM sets the DC, which is usually a standard DC for the item’s level.

Success The item’s unprocessed trait is removed, and it is now useable.

Failure The item is ruined and cannot be used.

Cure Food.name: 净化食物 Cure Food
Cure Food.description:
需求 你正持握或穿戴炊具。

你花费1小时腌制一个新鲜的可食用物品，例如一头巨猪的心脏或一位天使的舌头，或最多10负载的生食材，例如从被杀死的动物身上取下的肉。要使一个物品被视为新鲜，自其被采集起必须不超过8小时（不过像gentle repose这样的法术可以延长此持续时间）。你必须在腌制过程的持续时间内有火源可用。

掷骰一次@Check[survival]检定。GM设定DC，通常为该物品等级的标准DC。

成功 该物品被腌制完成，并拥有1年的有效期。

失败该物品被毁坏且无法使用。

Requirements You are holding or wearing cookware.

You spend 1 hour curing a fresh edible item, such as the heart of a great boar or the tongue of an angel, or up to 10 Bulk of raw food, such as meat taken from a slain animal. For an item to be considered fresh, it must be less than 8 hours since it was harvested (though spells like gentle repose can extend this duration). You must have a fire available for the duration of the curing process.

Roll a @Check[survival] check. The GM sets the DC, which is usually a standard DC for the item’s level.

Success The item is cured and has an expiration date of 1 year.

Failure The item is ruined and cannot be used.

Harvest Creature.name: 收获生物 Harvest Creature
Harvest Creature.description:
需求 你正持握或穿戴一套雕刻工具。

你花费一些时间从一具死亡生物身上采集皮革、内脏、牙齿、爪以及其他有用的部位。花费的时间取决于该生物的体型，并且你必须双手使用雕刻工具。你进行一次 @Check[type:crafting] 检定。GM设定DC，通常为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.S55aqwWIzpQRFhcq.JournalEntryPage.pBS3DUjlzVuFgapv]{该生物等级的标准DC。}

要采集一个生物，你必须满足以下需求：

  • 你能采集的生物等级等于0 + 你在手艺（技能）上的熟练度加值（你的等级 + 熟练度阶位加值）。任何更高等级的生物对你的技能组合来说都过于复杂，你无法在不把尸体弄糟的情况下采集它们。

  • 你必须知道该生物是什么。如果你不知道该生物，你就不够了解它的解剖结构以进行采集。

大成功或大失败 成功 你采集到最大可能数量的战利品。

成功 GM在生物条目中为战利品掷骰。你采集到掷骰结果所示数量的战利品。如果某一类物品只有1件物品，GM不需要掷骰，你必定获得那1件物品。

失败 GM在生物条目中为战利品掷骰。你采集到掷骰结果所示数量的一半战利品，向下取整。如果你将要把单个物品减半，例如一枚龙牙，则该物品不会被采集到。

大成功或大失败 失败 你把采集搞砸了。你得不到任何战利品。

Requirements You are holding or wearing a carver's kit.

You spend some time harvesting the hide, guts, teeth, claws, and other useful parts from a dead creature. The amount of time spent depends on the creature’s size, and you must use the carver’s kit with both hands. You roll a @Check[type:crafting] check. The GM sets the DC, which is usually a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.S55aqwWIzpQRFhcq.JournalEntryPage.pBS3DUjlzVuFgapv]{standard DC for the creature’s level.}

To harvest a creature, you must meet the following requirements:

  • The level of creature you can harvest equals 0 + your proficiency bonus with the Crafting skill (your level + proficiency rank bonus). Any creatures of higher level are too complex for your skillset, and you cannot harvest them without botching the corpse in the process.

  • You must know what the creature is. If you do not know the creature, you don’t know its anatomy well enough to harvest it.

Critical Success You harvest the maximum possible amount of loot.

Success The GM rolls for loot in the creature entry. You harvest the amount of loot rolled. If a category of item only has one item, the GM doesn't roll and you are guaranteed that one item.

Failure The GM rolls for loot in the creature entry. You harvest half the amount of loot rolled, rounded down. If you would halve a single item, such as one dragon fang, the item is not harvested.

Critical Failure You botch the harvest. No loot is gained.
